items.claim: Gable Stevenson is the best prospect on the card.
items.quote: He is the best prospect of the card.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is on a two-fight losing streak.
items.quote: He's on a two loss streak, both to Dustin.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has only one win in his last four fights.
items.quote: one win in his last four fights and that was back in 2020.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis and Paddy Pimblett have poor striking defense.
items.quote: They leave themselves open. They have horrible defense

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis possesses more power than Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: Especially BSD, I think he's more powerful than Patty.

items.claim: Cody Durden is at risk of being cut from the UFC if he loses this fight.
items.quote: It is still possible if he loses this one, especially in like devastating fashion, that he could get cut.

items.claim: Alisandro Costa is a powerful puncher with good ground skills.
items.quote: He's a very powerful puncher. He's good on the ground.

items.claim: Alisandro Costa's takedown defense is not elite.
items.quote: It's not Fort Knox or anything. Elden Coro's taken him down a couple times.

items.claim: Cody Durden has poor striking defense and predictable head movement.
items.quote: Duran just doesn't have great defense. He doesn't pick up his hands that well. I think his head movement can be tracked

items.claim: Ryan Gondra relies almost exclusively on power and throwing hooks.
items.quote: All Gandra has is pretty much power. This guy is a madman. Just swinging hooks all day until he knocks you out.

items.claim: Zack Reese is more technical than Ryan Gondra.
items.quote: I think Zachary Reese is more technical.

items.claim: Zack Reese lacks the physicality of Ryan Gondra.
items.quote: he's lacking a lot of like the physicality that Gondra has.
